title: Glint
description: Beautiful client-side item tooltips with rarity colors, enchantment-based borders and custom icons.
body:
# Glint

Glint is a client-side Fabric mod that makes Minecraft item tooltips cleaner, more colorful, and more useful.

## Features

- Custom tooltip backgrounds, borders, and glow effects
- Rarity-based styling for all items:
  - Common: gray
  - Uncommon: dark green
  - Rare: cyan
  - Epic: purple
- Unique colors and icons for every vanilla enchantment
- Dominant enchantment styling for items with multiple enchantments
- Config screen when Mod Menu is installed
- Adjustable style intensity: Low, Normal, or High
- Fully client-side: servers do not need to install Glint

## Requirements

- Minecraft 26.1.2
- Fabric Loader 0.19.2 or newer
- Fabric API 0.148.0+26.1.2 or newer
- Java 25
- Mod Menu is optional but recommended

## Configuration

You can enable or disable:
- Rarity-based styles
- Custom borders
- Custom backgrounds
- Enchantment icons
- Glow effects
